# appflow destination update-android - Appflow

[Skip to main content](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination_update-android#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

\[[appflow](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow)\
, [destination](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination)\
, [update-android](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination_update-android)\
\]

Update an existing Google Play Store destination in Appflow

    appflow destination update-android [flags]

#### Examples[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination_update-android#examples "Direct link to Examples")

    appflow destination update-android --app-id=a1234bc --name="Google Play Production" --track=production"appflow destination update-android --app-id=a1234bc --name="Google Play Production" --package-name=com.yourdomain.rebrand"

### Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination_update-android#flags "Direct link to Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--app-id` \[required\] | `string` |     | Appflow app id |
| `--name` \[required\] | `string` |     | Your unique name for the destination in Appflow |
| `--aab` | `boolean` | `false` | Change the artifact type to AAB |
| `--apk` | `boolean` | `false` | Change the artifact type to APK |
| `--package-name` | `string` |     | Your app's package name in reverse domain format (e.g., com.yourdomain.yourappname) |
| `--rename` | `string` |     | Give your destination a new name |
| `--track` | `string` |     | The Play store track for app distribution (e.g., internal, alpha, beta, production) |
| `--upload-key` | `string` |     | Path to the key file Appflow uses to manage your app in the Play Store |

### Global Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination_update-android#global-flags "Direct link to Global Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `-h, --help` | `boolean` | `false` | Print help information for command |
| `--config` | `string` |     | Appflow config file (`.appflow.yaml` by default) |
| `--json` | `boolean` | `false` | For commands with output, shortcut to print as JSON |
| `--output` | `string` | `"text"` | For commands with output, print as \[json\] or human readable \[text\] |
| `--token` | `string` |     | Ionic authorization token |

### Outputs[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination_update-android#outputs "Direct link to Outputs")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | `string` | The name of a Destination you've created in Appflow. |
| `target` | `string` | The target (Apple App Store/Google Play) of your Destination in Appflow. |
| `artifactType` | `"APK" \| "DSYM" \| "XCARCHIVE" \| "IPA" \| "APP" \| "AAB" \| "WWW_MANIFEST" \| "WWW_MANIFEST_V2" \| "WWW_ZIP" \| "PNG" \| "MP4"` | The file type of the artifact that is uploaded to the store destination |
| `latestDeployment` (optional) | `object` | The latest successful deployment associated with this Channel or Destination. |
| `.buildId` | `number` | A unique identifier for a build done in Appflow. |
| `.buildNumber` (optional) | `number` | An app-specific build number for builds done in Appflow. |
| `.triggeredBy` | `string` | Appflow user that triggered the build associated with this deployment. |
| `.status` | `string` | The status of this deployment. |
| `.commitSha` (optional) | `string` | The commit hash. |
| `.commitAuthor` | `string` | The git user that created the commit associated with this build. |
| `.commitCreated` | `string` | String of datetime when the commit was created |
| `.commitBranch` | `string` | The branch on which the commit was created. |
| `packageName` (optional) | `string` | The package for the Google Play App associated with this Destination. |
| `track` | `string` | The track for the Google Play App associated with this Destination. |
| `releaseStatus` | `string` | The release status for the Google Play App associated with this Destination. |

    {  "name": "Development",  "target": "Google Play",  "artifactType": "AAB",  "latestDeployment": null,  "packageName": "com.example.app",  "track": "INTERNAL",  "releaseStatus": "DRAFT"}

[JSON](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination_update-android#outputs)
[Text](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination_update-android#outputs)

# appflow environment get - Appflow

[Skip to main content](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment_get#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

\[[appflow](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow)\
, [environment](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment)\
, [get](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment_get)\
\]

Get info for an environment in Appflow

    appflow environment get [flags]

#### Examples[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment_get#examples "Direct link to Examples")

    appflow environment get --app-id=a1234bc --name="My Env"

### Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment_get#flags "Direct link to Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--app-id` \[required\] | `string` |     | Appflow app id |
| `--name` \[required\] | `string` |     | Appflow environment name |

### Global Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment_get#global-flags "Direct link to Global Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `-h, --help` | `boolean` | `false` | Print help information for command |
| `--config` | `string` |     | Appflow config file (`.appflow.yaml` by default) |
| `--json` | `boolean` | `false` | For commands with output, shortcut to print as JSON |
| `--output` | `string` | `"text"` | For commands with output, print as \[json\] or human readable \[text\] |
| `--token` | `string` |     | Ionic authorization token |

### Outputs[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment_get#outputs "Direct link to Outputs")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | `string` | The name of an Environment you've created in Appflow. |
| `variables` | `object[]` | The combined list of all environment variables used for a build. |
| `.name` | `string` | The key of the environment variable. |
| `.value` | `string` | The value of the environment variable. |
| `secrets` | `object[]` | The combined list of all environment secrets used for a build. The key values are not downloaded; the key names are just displayed for reference. |
| `.name` | `string` | The key of the secret. |

    {  "name": "Test Environment",  "variables": [    {      "name": "myvar",      "value": "myvalue"    }  ],  "secrets": null}

# appflow destination list-deployments - Appflow

[Skip to main content](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination_list-deployments#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

\[[appflow](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow)\
, [destination](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination)\
, [list-deployments](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination_list-deployments)\
\]

Get list of deployments made to this store destination for the specified app

    appflow destination list-deployments [flags]

#### Examples[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination_list-deployments#examples "Direct link to Examples")

    appflow destination list-deployments --app-id=b3456cd --name=Production

### Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination_list-deployments#flags "Direct link to Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--app-id` \[required\] | `string` |     | Appflow app id |
| `--name` \[required\] | `string` |     | Store destination name |
| `--first` | `number` | `5` | Fetches the first n latest deployments to the destination |

### Global Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination_list-deployments#global-flags "Direct link to Global Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `-h, --help` | `boolean` | `false` | Print help information for command |
| `--config` | `string` |     | Appflow config file (`.appflow.yaml` by default) |
| `--json` | `boolean` | `false` | For commands with output, shortcut to print as JSON |
| `--output` | `string` | `"text"` | For commands with output, print as \[json\] or human readable \[text\] |
| `--token` | `string` |     | Ionic authorization token |

### Outputs[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination_list-deployments#outputs "Direct link to Outputs")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | `string` | The name of a Destination you've created in Appflow. |
| `target` | `string` | The target (Apple App Store/Google Play) of your Destination in Appflow. |
| `deployments` | `object[]` | A list of past deployments to this Live Update channel or Destination. |
| `.buildId` | `number` | A unique identifier for a build done in Appflow. |
| `.buildNumber` (optional) | `number` | An app-specific build number for builds done in Appflow. |
| `.triggeredBy` | `string` | Appflow user that triggered the build associated with this deployment. |
| `.status` | `string` | The status of this deployment. |
| `.commitSha` (optional) | `string` | The commit hash. |
| `.commitAuthor` | `string` | The git user that created the commit associated with this build. |
| `.commitCreated` | `string` | String of datetime when the commit was created |
| `.commitBranch` | `string` | The branch on which the commit was created. |

    {  "name": "Development",  "target": "Apple App Store",  "deployments": [    {      "buildId": 6010455,      "buildNumber": 25,      "triggeredBy": "Michael",      "status": "SUCCESS",      "commitSha": "cef1sdca",      "commitAuthor": "Michael",      "commitCreated": "2023-04-06T18:42:06.503109+00:00",      "commitBranch": "main"    }  ]}

# appflow environment create - Appflow

[Skip to main content](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment_create#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

\[[appflow](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow)\
, [environment](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment)\
, [create](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment_create)\
\]

Create a new environment for an app in Appflow

    appflow environment create [flags]

#### Examples[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment_create#examples "Direct link to Examples")

    appflow environment create --app-id=a1234bc --name="My Env" --env="URL=localhost:3000"appflow environment create --app-id=a1234bc --name="My Env" --env="URL=localhost:3000" --env="CI=true"appflow environment create --app-id=a1234bc --name="My Env" --env="URL=localhost:3000" --env="CI=true" --secret="API_KEY=123"

### Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment_create#flags "Direct link to Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--app-id` \[required\] | `string` |     | Appflow app id |
| `--name` \[required\] | `string` |     | Appflow environment name |
| `--env` | `string[]` | `[]` | Variables to expose to your build. Variables defined this way override those loaded using the `env-file` flag. Example: --env VAR=value |
| `--env-file` | `string[]` | `[]` | Files declaring environment variables to expose to your build. Variables from later files overwrite variables from earlier files. |
| `--secret` | `string[]` | `[]` | Secrets to expose to your build. Example: --secret VAR=value |

### Global Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment_create#global-flags "Direct link to Global Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `-h, --help` | `boolean` | `false` | Print help information for command |
| `--config` | `string` |     | Appflow config file (`.appflow.yaml` by default) |
| `--json` | `boolean` | `false` | For commands with output, shortcut to print as JSON |
| `--output` | `string` | `"text"` | For commands with output, print as \[json\] or human readable \[text\] |
| `--token` | `string` |     | Ionic authorization token |

### Outputs[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment_create#outputs "Direct link to Outputs")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | `string` | The name of an Environment you've created in Appflow. |
| `variables` | `object[]` | The combined list of all environment variables used for a build. |
| `.name` | `string` | The key of the environment variable. |
| `.value` | `string` | The value of the environment variable. |
| `secrets` | `object[]` | The combined list of all environment secrets used for a build. The key values are not downloaded; the key names are just displayed for reference. |
| `.name` | `string` | The key of the secret. |

    {  "name": "Test Environment",  "variables": [    {      "name": "myvar",      "value": "myvalue"    }  ],  "secrets": null}

# appflow build android - Appflow

[Skip to main content](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_build_android#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

\[[appflow](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow)\
, [build](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_build)\
, [android](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_build_android)\
\]

This command creates an Android build on Appflow. While the build is running, it prints the remote build log to the terminal.

    appflow build android [debug, release] [flags]

#### Examples[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_build_android#examples "Direct link to Examples")

    appflow build android debug --app-id=a1234bc --commit=a9eb85eappflow build android release --app-id=b3456cd --commit=4c511f1appflow build android debug --app-id=a1234bc --commit=a9eb85e --environment="My Custom Environment Name"appflow build android debug --app-id=a1234bc --commit=a9eb85e --native-config="My Custom Native Config Name --native-app-preview"appflow build android release --app-id=b3456cd --commit=4c511f1 --aab --apk --apk-name="my-app-prod.apk"  --webhook-url="http://webhook.com/test"

### Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_build_android#flags "Direct link to Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--app-id` \[required\] | `string` |     | Appflow app id |
| `--aab` | `boolean` | `false` | Download aab file |
| `--aab-name` | `string` |     | Download aab and rename file. Example: mapp.aab |
| `--apk` | `boolean` | `false` | Download apk file |
| `--apk-name` | `string` |     | Download apk and rename file. Example: myapp.apk |
| `--app-bundle-id` | `string` |     | Native config application bundle ID. Example: com.company.app |
| `--app-name` | `string` |     | Native config application name |
| `--build-stack` | `string` |     | Target platform ("Linux - 2023.10" / "Linux - 2024.10" / "Linux - 2024.06" / "Linux - 2023.06" / "Linux - 2023.04"), defaults to latest stack |
| `--commit` | `string` |     | Commit sha |
| `--dependency-caching` | `boolean` | `false` | Enabled NPM caching |
| `--detached` | `boolean` | `false` | Asynchronously run appflow build |
| `--env` | `string[]` | `[]` | Variables to expose to your build. Variables defined this way override those loaded using the `env-file` flag. Example: --env VAR=value |
| `--env-file` | `string[]` | `[]` | Files declaring environment variables to expose to your build. Variables from later files overwrite variables from earlier files. |
| `--environment` | `string` |     | The name of the predefined Appflow Environment to expose to your build |
| `--live-update-app-id` | `string` |     | Appflow application ID |
| `--live-update-channel-name` | `string` |     | Live Update channel name |
| `--live-update-disable-deploy` | `boolean` | `false` | Disable Live Updates from being applied |
| `--live-update-max-store` | `number` | `2` | Number of previous Live Updates that can be stored on a device |
| `--live-update-method` | `string` | `"background"` | Live Update method to determine how the app will check for and apply updates, "background", "auto", or "none" |
| `--live-update-min-background-duration` | `number` | `30` | Number of seconds the app needs to be in the background for it to have been considered "closed" |
| `--native-app-preview` | `boolean` | `false` | Enable app preview directly in the browser via a secure public URL with Appetize (only compatible with debug builds) |
| `--native-config` | `string` |     | The name of the native config to use for the build. Native configs are defined in the UI. |
| `--secret` | `string[]` | `[]` | Secrets to expose to your build. Example: --secret VAR=value |
| `--signing-cert` | `string` |     | Signing certificate (not required for debug builds) |
| `--webhook-url` | `string` |     | Schedules a webhook that executes after the build finishes. The payload will include a URL for downloading build artifacts if the build succeeds. |

### Global Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_build_android#global-flags "Direct link to Global Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `-h, --help` | `boolean` | `false` | Print help information for command |
| `--config` | `string` |     | Appflow config file (`.appflow.yaml` by default) |
| `--json` | `boolean` | `false` | For commands with output, shortcut to print as JSON |
| `--output` | `string` | `"text"` | For commands with output, print as \[json\] or human readable \[text\] |
| `--token` | `string` |     | Ionic authorization token |

### Outputs[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_build_android#outputs "Direct link to Outputs")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `appId` | `string` | Your app's unique identifier in Appflow. |
| `buildId` (optional) | `number` | A unique identifier for a build done in Appflow. |
| `buildNumber` (optional) | `number` | An app-specific build number for builds done in Appflow. |
| `buildStatus` | `"CREATED" \| "PENDING" \| "RUNNING" \| "BUILDING" \| "FAILED" \| "SUCCESS" \| "CANCELED"` | The current state of your build in Appflow. |
| `platform` | `"ANDROID" \| "IOS" \| "WEB"` | The ecosystem you are building for. |
| `commit` | `string` | The commit hash. |
| `buildStack` | `object` | A Build Stack in Appflow. |
| `.name` | `string` | The friendly name for a Build Stack in Appflow. |
| `.dependencies` (optional) | `object[]` | The list of pinned software versions for a Build Stack in Appflow. |
| `.name` | `string` | The name of a software used by a Build Stack in Appflow. |
| `.version` | `string` | The pinned version of a software used by a Build Stack in Appflow. |
| `environment` (optional) | `object` | The Environment for your build in Appflow. |
| `.name` | `string` | The name of an Environment you've created in Appflow. |
| `.files` (optional) | `string[]` | The list of local environment files provided to this command. |
| `.variables` (optional) | `{ "string": string, ... }` | The combined list of all environment variables used for a build. |
| `.secrets` (optional) | `{ "string": string, ... }` | The combined list of all environment secrets used for a build. The key values are not downloaded; the key names are just displayed for reference. |
| `artifacts` (optional) | `{ "APK": string, ... }` | All artifacts that were saved by Appflow during a build, and are available for download. |
| `dependencyCaching` (optional) | `boolean` | Whether or not dependency caching was enabled for this build. |
| `webhooks` (optional) | `object[]` | List of associated webhooks. |
| `.url` | `string` | The URL of the associated webhook. |
| `.status` | `generated.BuildNotificationStatus` | The status of the associated webhook. |
| `signingCert` (optional) | `string` | The signing certificate used by Appflow to deploy a build to the App Stores. |
| `buildType` | `string` | The kind of native build done by Appflow, e.g. dev or release builds. |
| `nativeConfig` (optional) | `object` | A Native Config to manipulate your build in Appflow. |
| `.name` | `string` | The name of a Native Config you've created in Appflow. |
| `.base` (optional) | `object` | These Native Config variables allow you to override properties on a Native Build. |
| `.name` (optional) | `string` | Override the home screen name for a Native Build. |
| `.bundleId` (optional) | `string` | Override the bundle identifier for a Native Build. |
| `.liveUpdatesConfig` (optional) | `object` | These Native Config variables allow you to override properties used by the Live Updates Plugin. |
| `.appId` (optional) | `string` | Your app's unique identifier in Appflow. |
| `.channelName` (optional) | `string` | The name of a channel that hosts Live Updates. |
| `.maxStore` (optional) | `number` | The maximum number of updates for the Live Updates Plugin to store on the device. |
| `.minBackgroundDuration` (optional) | `number` | The number of seconds the app needs to be in the background before the Live Updates Plugin considers it closed. |
| `.updateMethod` (optional) | `string` | The update method for the Live Updates Plugin to use. |
| `.disableDeploy` (optional) | `boolean` | Whether the Live Updates Plugin should be disabled or not. |
| `appetizeUrl` (optional) | `string` | The URL of the Appetize preview. |

##### Successful Output[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_build_android#successful-output "Direct link to Successful Output")

# appflow live-update bundle-artifact - Appflow

[Skip to main content](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_bundle-artifact#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

info

This feature is only available to **Enterprise** customers with access to [**Self-hosted Live Updates**](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/deploy/setup/self-hosted)
.

\[[appflow](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow)\
, [live-update](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update)\
, [bundle-artifact](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_bundle-artifact)\
\]

This command creates a pre-bundled Live Update artifact for Appflow, packaging your web app's compiled assets and a manifest file. Bundling prepares the update for deployment by generating necessary metadata and structuring files in a deployment-ready format. Note that after running this command, the update should be uploaded to your hosting provider before registering it with Appflow using the register-artifact command.

    appflow live-update bundle-artifact [flags]

#### Examples[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_bundle-artifact#examples "Direct link to Examples")

    appflow live-update bundle-artifact --build-dir=www --signing-key=$IONIC_SIGNING_KEY [--output-path=./build.zip]

#### Aliases[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_bundle-artifact#aliases "Direct link to Aliases")

*   "bundle"

### Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_bundle-artifact#flags "Direct link to Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--build-dir` \[required\] | `string` |     | Web asset path (e.g. 'www') |
| `--output-path` | `string` |     | The path to the output of the resulting zip file |
| `--signing-key` | `string` |     | Private signing key as a string or the path to a file containing the private signing key |

### Global Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_bundle-artifact#global-flags "Direct link to Global Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `-h, --help` | `boolean` | `false` | Print help information for command |
| `--config` | `string` |     | Appflow config file (`.appflow.yaml` by default) |
| `--json` | `boolean` | `false` | For commands with output, shortcut to print as JSON |
| `--output` | `string` | `"text"` | For commands with output, print as \[json\] or human readable \[text\] |
| `--token` | `string` |     | Ionic authorization token |

### Outputs[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_bundle-artifact#outputs "Direct link to Outputs")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `bundlePath` | `string` | The file path to the newly bundled Live Update. |

##### Successful Output[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_bundle-artifact#successful-output "Direct link to Successful Output")

    {  "bundlePath": "live-update-bundle.zip"}

[JSON](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_bundle-artifact#outputs)
[Text](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_bundle-artifact#outputs)

##### Failed Output[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_bundle-artifact#failed-output "Direct link to Failed Output")

    {  "bundlePath": ""}

[JSON](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_bundle-artifact#outputs)
[Text](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_bundle-artifact#outputs)

, [live-update](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update)\

\]

Get details about a Live Update channel for the specified app

#### Examples[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_channel-details#examples "Direct link to Examples")

    appflow live-update channel-details --app-id=b3456cd --name=Production

### Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_channel-details#flags "Direct link to Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--app-id` \[required\] | `string` |     | Appflow app id |
| `--name` \[required\] | `string` |     | Live Update channel name |

### Global Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_channel-details#global-flags "Direct link to Global Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `-h, --help` | `boolean` | `false` | Print help information for command |
| `--config` | `string` |     | Appflow config file (`.appflow.yaml` by default) |
| `--json` | `boolean` | `false` | For commands with output, shortcut to print as JSON |
| `--output` | `string` | `"text"` | For commands with output, print as \[json\] or human readable \[text\] |
| `--token` | `string` |     | Ionic authorization token |

### Outputs[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_channel-details#outputs "Direct link to Outputs")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | `string` | The name of a channel that hosts Live Updates. |
| `latestDeployment` (optional) | `object` | A last deployment made to this Live Update channel. |
| `.buildId` | `number` | A unique identifier for a build done in Appflow. |
| `.buildNumber` (optional) | `number` | An app-specific build number for builds done in Appflow. |
| `.triggeredBy` | `string` | Appflow user that triggered the build associated with this deployment. |
| `.status` | `string` | The status of this deployment. |
| `.commitSha` (optional) | `string` | The commit hash. |
| `.commitAuthor` | `string` | The git user that created the commit associated with this build. |
| `.commitCreated` | `string` | String of datetime when the commit was created |
| `.commitBranch` | `string` | The branch on which the commit was created. |

    {  "name": "Production",  "latestDeployment": {    "buildId": 6010455,    "buildNumber": 25,    "triggeredBy": "Michael",    "status": "SUCCESS",    "commitSha": "cef1sdca",    "commitAuthor": "Michael",    "commitCreated": "2023-04-06T18:42:06.503109+00:00",    "commitBranch": "main"  }}

[JSON](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_channel-details#outputs)

[Skip to main content](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment_unset#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

\[[appflow](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow)\
, [environment](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment)\
, [unset](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment_unset)\
\]

Remove key/value pairs from an existing environment in Appflow

    appflow environment unset [flags]

#### Examples[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment_unset#examples "Direct link to Examples")

    appflow environment unset --app-id=a1234bc --name="My Env" --env="VERSION" --env="ENVIRONMENT" --secret="KEY"

### Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment_unset#flags "Direct link to Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--app-id` \[required\] | `string` |     | Appflow app id |
| `--name` \[required\] | `string` |     | Appflow environment name |
| `--env` | `string[]` | `[]` | Name of the variable to remove |
| `--secret` | `string[]` | `[]` | Name of the secret to remove |

### Global Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment_unset#global-flags "Direct link to Global Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `-h, --help` | `boolean` | `false` | Print help information for command |
| `--config` | `string` |     | Appflow config file (`.appflow.yaml` by default) |
| `--json` | `boolean` | `false` | For commands with output, shortcut to print as JSON |
| `--output` | `string` | `"text"` | For commands with output, print as \[json\] or human readable \[text\] |
| `--token` | `string` |     | Ionic authorization token |

### Outputs[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment_unset#outputs "Direct link to Outputs")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | `string` | The name of an Environment you've created in Appflow. |
| `variables` (optional) | `object[]` | The combined list of all environment variables used for a build. |
| `.name` | `string` | The key of the environment variable. |
| `.value` | `string` | The value of the environment variable. |
| `secrets` (optional) | `object[]` | The combined list of all environment secrets used for a build. The key values are not downloaded; the key names are just displayed for reference. |
| `.name` | `string` | The key of the secret. |

    {  "name": "Test Environment",  "variables": [    {      "name": "myvar",      "value": "myvalue"    }  ],  "secrets": [    {      "name": "mysecret"    }  ]}

[JSON](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment_unset#outputs)
[Text](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment_unset#outputs)

# appflow live-update delete-channel - Appflow

[Skip to main content](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_delete-channel#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

note

If a channel referenced in an app using live updates is deleted, live updates will no longer be applied until the channel is recreated or the app is updated to reference a different channel.

\[[appflow](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow)\
, [live-update](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update)\
, [delete-channel](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_delete-channel)\
\]

Delete a Live Update channel in Appflow

    appflow live-update delete-channel [flags]

#### Examples[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_delete-channel#examples "Direct link to Examples")

    appflow live-update delete-channel --app-id=b3456cd --name=Development

### Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_delete-channel#flags "Direct link to Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--app-id` \[required\] | `string` |     | Appflow app id |
| `--name` \[required\] | `string` |     | Live Update channel name |
| `--ignore-errors` | `boolean` | `false` | Ignore channel deletion errors |

### Global Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_delete-channel#global-flags "Direct link to Global Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `-h, --help` | `boolean` | `false` | Print help information for command |
| `--config` | `string` |     | Appflow config file (`.appflow.yaml` by default) |
| `--json` | `boolean` | `false` | For commands with output, shortcut to print as JSON |
| `--output` | `string` | `"text"` | For commands with output, print as \[json\] or human readable \[text\] |
| `--token` | `string` |     | Ionic authorization token |

### Outputs[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_delete-channel#outputs "Direct link to Outputs")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
|     | `string` | The command output. |

    "Successfully deleted Live Update channel: production"

[JSON](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_delete-channel#outputs)
[Text](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_delete-channel#outputs)

# appflow live-update list-deployments - Appflow

[Skip to main content](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_list-deployments#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

\[[appflow](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow)\
, [live-update](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update)\
, [list-deployments](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_list-deployments)\
\]

Get list of deployments made to this Live Update channel for the specified app

    appflow live-update list-deployments [flags]

#### Examples[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_list-deployments#examples "Direct link to Examples")

    appflow live-update list-deployments --app-id=b3456cd --name=Production

### Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_list-deployments#flags "Direct link to Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--app-id` \[required\] | `string` |     | Appflow app id |
| `--name` \[required\] | `string` |     | Live Update channel name |
| `--first` | `number` | `5` | Fetches the first n latest deployments to the channel |

### Global Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_list-deployments#global-flags "Direct link to Global Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `-h, --help` | `boolean` | `false` | Print help information for command |
| `--config` | `string` |     | Appflow config file (`.appflow.yaml` by default) |
| `--json` | `boolean` | `false` | For commands with output, shortcut to print as JSON |
| `--output` | `string` | `"text"` | For commands with output, print as \[json\] or human readable \[text\] |
| `--token` | `string` |     | Ionic authorization token |

### Outputs[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_list-deployments#outputs "Direct link to Outputs")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | `string` | The name of a channel that hosts Live Updates. |
| `channelDeployments` | `object[]` | A list of past deployments to this Live Update channel or Destination. |
| `.buildId` | `number` | A unique identifier for a build done in Appflow. |
| `.buildNumber` (optional) | `number` | An app-specific build number for builds done in Appflow. |
| `.triggeredBy` | `string` | Appflow user that triggered the build associated with this deployment. |
| `.status` | `string` | The status of this deployment. |
| `.commitSha` (optional) | `string` | The commit hash. |
| `.commitAuthor` | `string` | The git user that created the commit associated with this build. |
| `.commitCreated` | `string` | String of datetime when the commit was created |
| `.commitBranch` | `string` | The branch on which the commit was created. |

    {  "name": "Production",  "channelDeployments": [    {      "buildId": 6010455,      "buildNumber": 25,      "triggeredBy": "Michael",      "status": "SUCCESS",      "commitSha": "cef1sdca",      "commitAuthor": "Michael",      "commitCreated": "2023-04-06T18:42:06.503109+00:00",      "commitBranch": "main"    }  ]}

[JSON](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_list-deployments#outputs)
[Text](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_list-deployments#outputs)

# appflow live-update download-artifact - Appflow

[Skip to main content](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_download-artifact#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

\[[appflow](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow)\
, [live-update](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update)\
, [download-artifact](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_download-artifact)\
\]

Download the latest web build from a Live Update channel in Appflow

    appflow live-update download-artifact [flags]

#### Examples[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_download-artifact#examples "Direct link to Examples")

    appflow live-update download-artifact --app-id b3456cd --channel-name Development [--zip-name build.zip --json]

#### Aliases[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_download-artifact#aliases "Direct link to Aliases")

*   "download"

### Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_download-artifact#flags "Direct link to Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--app-id` \[required\] | `string` |     | Appflow app id |
| `--channel-name` \[required\] | `string` |     | Live Update channel name |
| `--zip-name` | `string` |     | Specify name for zip file |

### Global Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_download-artifact#global-flags "Direct link to Global Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `-h, --help` | `boolean` | `false` | Print help information for command |
| `--config` | `string` |     | Appflow config file (`.appflow.yaml` by default) |
| `--json` | `boolean` | `false` | For commands with output, shortcut to print as JSON |
| `--output` | `string` | `"text"` | For commands with output, print as \[json\] or human readable \[text\] |
| `--token` | `string` |     | Ionic authorization token |

### Outputs[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_download-artifact#outputs "Direct link to Outputs")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `appId` | `string` | Your app's unique identifier in Appflow. |
| `channelName` | `string` | The name of a channel that hosts Live Updates. |
| `zipName` (optional) | `string` | The relative filepath containing the downloaded Live Update ZIP. |
| `status` | `"CREATED" \| "PENDING" \| "RUNNING" \| "BUILDING" \| "FAILED" \| "SUCCESS" \| "CANCELED"` | The status of the Live Update download request. |

##### Successful Output[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_download-artifact#successful-output "Direct link to Successful Output")

    {  "appId": "052b32ac",  "channelName": "Production",  "zipName": "0e949006-65e4-4f22-8579-7fa8cf7b11c0.zip",  "status": "SUCCESS"}

# appflow destination get - Appflow

[Skip to main content](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination_get#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

\[[appflow](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow)\
, [destination](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination)\
, [get](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination_get)\
\]

Get info for a destination in Appflow

    appflow destination get [flags]

#### Examples[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination_get#examples "Direct link to Examples")

    appflow destination get --app-id=a1234bc --name="Development"

### Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination_get#flags "Direct link to Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--app-id` \[required\] | `string` |     | Appflow app id |
| `--name` \[required\] | `string` |     | Appflow destination name |

### Global Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination_get#global-flags "Direct link to Global Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `-h, --help` | `boolean` | `false` | Print help information for command |
| `--config` | `string` |     | Appflow config file (`.appflow.yaml` by default) |
| `--json` | `boolean` | `false` | For commands with output, shortcut to print as JSON |
| `--output` | `string` | `"text"` | For commands with output, print as \[json\] or human readable \[text\] |
| `--token` | `string` |     | Ionic authorization token |

### Outputs[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination_get#outputs "Direct link to Outputs")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | `string` | The name of a Destination you've created in Appflow. |
| `target` | `string` | The target (Apple App Store/Google Play) of your Destination in Appflow. |
| `artifactType` | `"APK" \| "DSYM" \| "XCARCHIVE" \| "IPA" \| "APP" \| "AAB" \| "WWW_MANIFEST" \| "WWW_MANIFEST_V2" \| "WWW_ZIP" \| "PNG" \| "MP4"` | The file type of the artifact that is uploaded to the store destination |
| `latestDeployment` (optional) | `object` | The latest successful deployment associated with this Channel or Destination. |
| `.buildId` | `number` | A unique identifier for a build done in Appflow. |
| `.buildNumber` (optional) | `number` | An app-specific build number for builds done in Appflow. |
| `.triggeredBy` | `string` | Appflow user that triggered the build associated with this deployment. |
| `.status` | `string` | The status of this deployment. |
| `.commitSha` (optional) | `string` | The commit hash. |
| `.commitAuthor` | `string` | The git user that created the commit associated with this build. |
| `.commitCreated` | `string` | String of datetime when the commit was created |
| `.commitBranch` | `string` | The branch on which the commit was created. |
| `appleAppId` | `string` | Your app's unique identifier in Appflow. |
| `username` | `string` | The username of the Apple account associated with this Destination. |
| `teamId` (optional) | `string` | The id of the Apple Developer team associated with this Destination. |
| `packageName` (optional) | `string` | The package for the Google Play App associated with this Destination. |
| `track` | `string` | The track for the Google Play App associated with this Destination. |
| `releaseStatus` | `string` | The release status for the Google Play App associated with this Destination. |

##### Successful Apple App Store Output[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination_get#successful-apple-app-store-output "Direct link to Successful Apple App Store Output")

    {  "name": "Development",  "target": "Apple App Store",  "artifactType": "IPA",  "latestDeployment": {    "buildId": 123,    "buildNumber": 25,    "triggeredBy": "Jane Doe",    "status": "",    "commitSha": "cef1sdca",    "commitAuthor": "Dominic Ash",    "commitCreated": "2022-12-09T19:38:09Z",    "commitBranch": "main"  },  "appleAppId": "123",  "username": "me@apple.com",  "teamId": "XYZ"}

[JSON](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination_get#outputs)
[Text](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination_get#outputs)

##### Successful Google Play Output[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination_get#successful-google-play-output "Direct link to Successful Google Play Output")

    {  "name": "Development",  "target": "Google Play",  "artifactType": "AAB",  "latestDeployment": null,  "packageName": "com.example.app",  "track": "INTERNAL",  "releaseStatus": "DRAFT"}

[JSON](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination_get#outputs)
[Text](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_destination_get#outputs)

---

# appflow live-update generate-manifest - Appflow

, [generate-manifest](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_generate-manifest)\
\]

Generate the manifest for a Live Update artifact

| `--build-dir` \[required\] | `string` |     | Web asset path (e.g. 'www') |

, [environment](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment)\
, [update](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment_update)\
\]

Rename an environment for an app in Appflow

#### Examples[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment_update#examples "Direct link to Examples")

    appflow environment update --app-id=a1234bc --name="My Env" --rename="My New Env"

### Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment_update#flags "Direct link to Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--app-id` \[required\] | `string` |     | Appflow app id |
| `--name` \[required\] | `string` |     | Appflow environment name |
| `--rename` \[required\] | `string` |     | New Appflow environment name |

### Global Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment_update#global-flags "Direct link to Global Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `-h, --help` | `boolean` | `false` | Print help information for command |
| `--config` | `string` |     | Appflow config file (`.appflow.yaml` by default) |
| `--json` | `boolean` | `false` | For commands with output, shortcut to print as JSON |
| `--output` | `string` | `"text"` | For commands with output, print as \[json\] or human readable \[text\] |
| `--token` | `string` |     | Ionic authorization token |

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | `string` | The name of an Environment you've created in Appflow. |
| `variables` (optional) | `object[]` | The combined list of all environment variables used for a build. |
| `.name` | `string` | The key of the environment variable. |
| `.value` | `string` | The value of the environment variable. |
| `secrets` (optional) | `object[]` | The combined list of all environment secrets used for a build. The key values are not downloaded; the key names are just displayed for reference. |
| `.name` | `string` | The key of the secret. |

    {  "name": "Test Environment",  "variables": [    {      "name": "myvar",      "value": "myvalue"    }  ],  "secrets": [    {      "name": "mysecret"    }  ]}

[JSON](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment_update#outputs)
[Text](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_environment_update#outputs)

# appflow live-update register-artifact - Appflow

[Skip to main content](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_register-artifact#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

info

This feature is only available to **Enterprise** customers with access to [**Self-hosted Live Updates**](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/deploy/setup/self-hosted)
.

\[[appflow](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow)\
, [live-update](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update)\
, [register-artifact](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_register-artifact)\
\]

This command registers a pre-bundled Live Update artifact with Appflow, including necessary details about the update's location and metadata. Registration enables Appflow to make the update available for deployment to your app users through a Live Update channel. Note that the update must be uploaded to a hosting provider before running this command.

    appflow live-update register-artifact [flags]

#### Examples[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_register-artifact#examples "Direct link to Examples")

    appflow live-update register-artifact --app-id=12345 --artifact-url=https://example.com/builds/95f66b50.zip --commit-sha=95f66b50279d54b1f0733e9188fd454768f3fd96 --commit-ref=main [--commit-message=initial]

#### Aliases[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_register-artifact#aliases "Direct link to Aliases")

*   "register"

### Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_register-artifact#flags "Direct link to Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--app-id` \[required\] | `string` |     | Appflow app id |
| `--artifact-url` \[required\] | `string` |     | The URL to the Self-hosted Live Update Artifact (e.g. '[https://example.com/builds/95f66b50.zip](https://example.com/builds/95f66b50.zip)<br>') |
| `--commit-ref` \[required\] | `string` |     | Git commit ref such as a branch or a tag |
| `--commit-sha` \[required\] | `string` |     | Git commit SHA |
| `--artifact-type` | `string` |     | The type of the Live Update Artifact being registered ("zip" / "manifest"), defaults to "zip" |
| `--commit-message` | `string` |     | Commit message to be displayed in Appflow |
| `--signed` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the artifact is signed or not |

### Global Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_register-artifact#global-flags "Direct link to Global Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `-h, --help` | `boolean` | `false` | Print help information for command |
| `--config` | `string` |     | Appflow config file (`.appflow.yaml` by default) |
| `--json` | `boolean` | `false` | For commands with output, shortcut to print as JSON |
| `--output` | `string` | `"text"` | For commands with output, print as \[json\] or human readable \[text\] |
| `--token` | `string` |     | Ionic authorization token |

### Outputs[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_register-artifact#outputs "Direct link to Outputs")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `appId` | `string` | Your app's unique identifier in Appflow. |
| `artifactURL` | `string` | The self-hosted URL to be used to retrieve a Live Update. |
| `buildId` | `number` | A unique identifier for a build done in Appflow. |
| `buildNumber` | `number` | An app-specific build number for builds done in Appflow. |
| `commitSha` | `string` | The commit hash. |
| `commitRef` | `string` | The branch a commit was made on. |
| `commitMessage` (optional) | `string` | The message that was provided when a commit was made. |

##### Successful Output[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_register-artifact#successful-output "Direct link to Successful Output")

    {  "appId": "052b32ac",  "artifactURL": "https://example.com/builds/95f66b50.zip",  "buildId": 6010455,  "buildNumber": 25,  "commitSha": "cef1sdca",  "commitRef": "main",  "commitMessage": "feat: enable customer delight"}

[JSON](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_register-artifact#outputs)
[Text](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_register-artifact#outputs)

##### Failed Output[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_register-artifact#failed-output "Direct link to Failed Output")

    {  "appId": "052b32ac",  "artifactURL": "https://example.com/builds/95f66b50.zip",  "buildId": 0,  "buildNumber": 0,  "commitSha": "cef1sdca",  "commitRef": "main",  "commitMessage": "feat: enable customer delight"}

[JSON](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_register-artifact#outputs)
[Text](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_register-artifact#outputs)

---

# appflow live-update generate-signing-key - Appflow

[Skip to main content](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_generate-signing-key#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

info

This feature is only available to **Enterprise** customers with access to [**Self-hosted Live Updates**](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/deploy/setup/self-hosted)
.

\[[appflow](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow)\
, [live-update](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update)\
, [generate-signing-key](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_generate-signing-key)\
\]

Generate a public and private key pair for signing Live Updates.

    appflow live-update generate-signing-key [flags]

#### Examples[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_generate-signing-key#examples "Direct link to Examples")

    appflow live-update generate-signing-key --public appflow_public.pem --private appflow_private.pem

### Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_generate-signing-key#flags "Direct link to Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--private` | `string` | `"appflow_private.pem"` | File name to use for the private RSA key file. |
| `--public` | `string` | `"appflow_public.pem"` | File name to use for the public RSA key file. |

### Global Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_generate-signing-key#global-flags "Direct link to Global Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `-h, --help` | `boolean` | `false` | Print help information for command |
| `--config` | `string` |     | Appflow config file (`.appflow.yaml` by default) |
| `--json` | `boolean` | `false` | For commands with output, shortcut to print as JSON |
| `--output` | `string` | `"text"` | For commands with output, print as \[json\] or human readable \[text\] |
| `--token` | `string` |     | Ionic authorization token |

### Outputs[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_generate-signing-key#outputs "Direct link to Outputs")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `"CREATED" \| "PENDING" \| "RUNNING" \| "BUILDING" \| "FAILED" \| "SUCCESS" \| "CANCELED"` | The status of generating the signing key pair. |
| `publicKey` | `string` | The relative filepath of the public key. |
| `privateKey` | `string` | The relative filepath of the private key. |

##### Successful Output[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_generate-signing-key#successful-output "Direct link to Successful Output")

    {  "status": "SUCCESS",  "publicKey": "appflow_public.pem",  "privateKey": "appflow_private.pem"}

[Text](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_generate-signing-key#outputs)

    {  "status": "FAILED",  "publicKey": "",  "privateKey": ""}

# appflow native-config - Appflow

[Skip to main content](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_native-config#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

\[[appflow](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow)\
, [native-config](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_native-config)\
\]

High-level commands to use Native Configs in Appflow.

    appflow native-config [flags]

### Sub-commands[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_native-config#sub-commands "Direct link to Sub-commands")

*   [appflow native-config create](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_native-config_create)
    
*   [appflow native-config delete](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_native-config_delete)
    
*   [appflow native-config get](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_native-config_get)
    
*   [appflow native-config list](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_native-config_list)
    
*   [appflow native-config update](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_native-config_update)
    

### Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_native-config#flags "Direct link to Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--app-id` \[required\] | `string` |     | Appflow app id |

### Global Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_native-config#global-flags "Direct link to Global Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `-h, --help` | `boolean` | `false` | Print help information for command |
| `--config` | `string` |     | Appflow config file (`.appflow.yaml` by default) |
| `--json` | `boolean` | `false` | For commands with output, shortcut to print as JSON |
| `--output` | `string` | `"text"` | For commands with output, print as \[json\] or human readable \[text\] |
| `--token` | `string` |     | Ionic authorization token |

# appflow live-update set-native-versions - Appflow

[Skip to main content](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_set-native-versions#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

\[[appflow](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow)\
, [live-update](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update)\
, [set-native-versions](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_set-native-versions)\
\]

Control when an update happens based on native features and binary version

    appflow live-update set-native-versions [flags]

#### Examples[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_set-native-versions#examples "Direct link to Examples")

    appflow live-update set-native-versions --app-id=b3456cd --build-id=baf924a --ios-min=1.2.3 --android-min=1.2.3

### Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_set-native-versions#flags "Direct link to Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--app-id` \[required\] | `string` |     | Appflow app id |
| `--build-id` \[required\] | `number` |     | Appflow build id |
| `--android-eq` | `string` |     | If the Android native binary is this version, do NOT download this live update, because they are equal |
| `--android-max` | `string` |     | Android native binary must be this version or below in order to download this live update |
| `--android-min` | `string` |     | Android native binary must be at least this version in order to download this live update |
| `--ios-eq` | `string` |     | If the iOS native binary is this version, do NOT download this live update, because they are equal |
| `--ios-max` | `string` |     | iOS native binary must be this version or below in order to download this live update |
| `--ios-min` | `string` |     | iOS native binary must be at least this version in order to download this live update |

### Global Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_set-native-versions#global-flags "Direct link to Global Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `-h, --help` | `boolean` | `false` | Print help information for command |
| `--config` | `string` |     | Appflow config file (`.appflow.yaml` by default) |
| `--json` | `boolean` | `false` | For commands with output, shortcut to print as JSON |
| `--output` | `string` | `"text"` | For commands with output, print as \[json\] or human readable \[text\] |
| `--token` | `string` |     | Ionic authorization token |

### Outputs[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_set-native-versions#outputs "Direct link to Outputs")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `appId` | `string` | Your app's unique identifier in Appflow. |
| `buildId` | `number` | A unique identifier for a build done in Appflow. |
| `androidMin` (optional) | `string` | The Native Binary version that is the minimum required in order to use this Live Update. |
| `androidMax` (optional) | `string` | The Native Binary version that is the maximum still allowed to use this Live Update. |
| `androidEq` (optional) | `string` | The Native Binary version that should be considered equivalent and ignore this Live Update. |
| `iosMin` (optional) | `string` | The Native Binary version that is the minimum required in order to use this Live Update. |
| `iosMax` (optional) | `string` | The Native Binary version that is the maximum still allowed to use this Live Update. |
| `iosEq` (optional) | `string` | The Native Binary version that should be considered equivalent and ignore this Live Update. |

##### Successful Output[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_set-native-versions#successful-output "Direct link to Successful Output")

    {  "appId": "052b32ac",  "buildId": 6010455,  "androidMin": "1.0.0",  "androidMax": "1.3.0",  "androidEq": "1.2.3",  "iosMin": "1.0.0",  "iosMax": "1.3.0",  "iosEq": "1.2.3"}

[JSON](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_set-native-versions#outputs)
[Text](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_set-native-versions#outputs)

##### Failed Output[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_set-native-versions#failed-output "Direct link to Failed Output")

    null

[JSON](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_set-native-versions#outputs)
[Text](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_live-update_set-native-versions#outputs)

# appflow build web - Appflow

[Skip to main content](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_build_web#__docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

\[[appflow](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow)\
, [build](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_build)\
, [web](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_build_web)\
\]

This command creates a web build on Appflow. While the build is running, it prints the remote build log to the terminal.

    appflow build web [flags]

#### Examples[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_build_web#examples "Direct link to Examples")

    appflow build web --app-id=a1234bc --commit=a9eb85eappflow build web --app-id=a1234bc --commit=a9eb85e --web-previewappflow build web --app-id=a1234bc --commit=a9eb85e --webhook-url="http://webhook.com/test"appflow build web-preview --app-id=b3456cd --commit=4c511f1 --environment="My Custom Environment Name"

#### Aliases[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_build_web#aliases "Direct link to Aliases")

*   "live-update"
*   "web-preview"

### Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_build_web#flags "Direct link to Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--app-id` \[required\] | `string` |     | Appflow app id |
| `--build-stack` | `string` |     | Target platform ("Linux - 2023.10" / "Linux - 2024.10" / "Linux - 2024.06" / "Linux - 2023.06" / "Linux - 2023.04"), defaults to latest stack |
| `--commit` | `string` |     | Commit sha |
| `--dependency-caching` | `boolean` | `false` | Enabled NPM caching |
| `--detached` | `boolean` | `false` | Asynchronously run appflow build |
| `--env` | `string[]` | `[]` | Variables to expose to your build. Variables defined this way override those loaded using the `env-file` flag. Example: --env VAR=value |
| `--env-file` | `string[]` | `[]` | Files declaring environment variables to expose to your build. Variables from later files overwrite variables from earlier files. |
| `--environment` | `string` |     | The name of the predefined Appflow Environment to expose to your build |
| `--secret` | `string[]` | `[]` | Secrets to expose to your build. Example: --secret VAR=value |
| `--web-preview` | `boolean` | `false` | Enable web preview |
| `--webhook-url` | `string` |     | Schedules a webhook that executes after the build finishes. The payload will include a URL for downloading build artifacts if the build succeeds. |
| `--zip` | `boolean` | `false` | Download zip file |
| `--zip-name` | `string` |     | Download zip and rename file. Example: myapp.zip |

### Global Flags[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_build_web#global-flags "Direct link to Global Flags")

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `-h, --help` | `boolean` | `false` | Print help information for command |
| `--config` | `string` |     | Appflow config file (`.appflow.yaml` by default) |
| `--json` | `boolean` | `false` | For commands with output, shortcut to print as JSON |
| `--output` | `string` | `"text"` | For commands with output, print as \[json\] or human readable \[text\] |
| `--token` | `string` |     | Ionic authorization token |

### Outputs[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_build_web#outputs "Direct link to Outputs")

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `appId` | `string` | Your app's unique identifier in Appflow. |
| `buildId` (optional) | `number` | A unique identifier for a build done in Appflow. |
| `buildNumber` (optional) | `number` | An app-specific build number for builds done in Appflow. |
| `buildStatus` | `"CREATED" \| "PENDING" \| "RUNNING" \| "BUILDING" \| "FAILED" \| "SUCCESS" \| "CANCELED"` | The current state of your build in Appflow. |
| `platform` | `"ANDROID" \| "IOS" \| "WEB"` | The ecosystem you are building for. |
| `commit` | `string` | The commit hash. |
| `buildStack` | `object` | A Build Stack in Appflow. |
| `.name` | `string` | The friendly name for a Build Stack in Appflow. |
| `.dependencies` (optional) | `object[]` | The list of pinned software versions for a Build Stack in Appflow. |
| `.name` | `string` | The name of a software used by a Build Stack in Appflow. |
| `.version` | `string` | The pinned version of a software used by a Build Stack in Appflow. |
| `environment` (optional) | `object` | The Environment for your build in Appflow. |
| `.name` | `string` | The name of an Environment you've created in Appflow. |
| `.files` (optional) | `string[]` | The list of local environment files provided to this command. |
| `.variables` (optional) | `{ "string": string, ... }` | The combined list of all environment variables used for a build. |
| `.secrets` (optional) | `{ "string": string, ... }` | The combined list of all environment secrets used for a build. The key values are not downloaded; the key names are just displayed for reference. |
| `artifacts` (optional) | `{ "APK": string, ... }` | All artifacts that were saved by Appflow during a build, and are available for download. |
| `dependencyCaching` (optional) | `boolean` | Whether or not dependency caching was enabled for this build. |
| `webhooks` (optional) | `object[]` | List of associated webhooks. |
| `.url` | `string` | The URL of the associated webhook. |
| `.status` | `generated.BuildNotificationStatus` | The status of the associated webhook. |
| `webPreview` | `boolean` | Whether the Web Build was created with an app preview on the Appflow Dashboard. |
| `webPreviewUrl` (optional) | `string` | The URL to visit to see your app preview, available on the Appflow Dashboard. |
| `devicePreviewUrl` (optional) | `string` | The shareable URL to visit to see your app preview, available on the Appflow Dashboard. |
| `androidMin` (optional) | `string` | The Native Binary version that is the minimum required in order to use this Live Update. |
| `androidMax` (optional) | `string` | The Native Binary version that is the maximum still allowed to use this Live Update. |
| `androidEq` (optional) | `string` | The Native Binary version that should be considered equivalent and ignore this Live Update. |
| `iosMin` (optional) | `string` | The Native Binary version that is the minimum required in order to use this Live Update. |
| `iosMax` (optional) | `string` | The Native Binary version that is the maximum still allowed to use this Live Update. |
| `iosEq` (optional) | `string` | The Native Binary version that should be considered equivalent and ignore this Live Update. |

##### Successful Output[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_build_web#successful-output "Direct link to Successful Output")

    {  "appId": "052b32ac",  "buildId": 6010455,  "buildNumber": 25,  "buildStatus": "SUCCESS",  "platform": "WEB",  "commit": "cef1sdca",  "buildStack": {    "name": "Linux - 2022.10",    "dependencies": [      {        "name": "Cordova CLI",        "version": "11.0.0"      },      {        "name": "Ionic CLI",        "version": "6.20.3"      },      {        "name": "Node.js",        "version": "18.12.1"      },      {        "name": "Node.js versions",        "version": "14.21.1 / 16.18.1 / 18.12.1"      },      {        "name": "npm",        "version": "8.19.3"      },      {        "name": "Yarn",        "version": "1.22.19"      },      {        "name": "Python",        "version": "3"      },      {        "name": "Debian",        "version": "11.4"      },      {        "name": "Gradle",        "version": "5.6.4"      },      {        "name": "OpenJDK",        "version": "1.8.0_332 / 11.0.16"      },      {        "name": "Android SDK",        "version": "27-33"      }    ]  },  "environment": {    "name": "Test Environment",    "files": [      ".env-file1",      ".env-file2"    ],    "variables": {      "Var1": "value1",      "Var2": "value2"    },    "secrets": {      "Sec1": "********",      "Sec2": "********"    }  },  "artifacts": {    "WWW_ZIP": "0e949006-65e4-4f22-8579-7fa8cf7b11c0.zip"  },  "dependencyCaching": null,  "webhooks": null,  "webPreview": true,  "webPreviewUrl": "https://dashboard.ionicframework.com/preview/052b32ac/aq5v80ak38",  "devicePreviewUrl": "https://aq5v80ak38.appflowapp.com",  "androidMin": "1.0.0",  "androidMax": "1.3.0",  "androidEq": "1.2.3",  "iosMin": "1.0.0",  "iosMax": "1.3.0",  "iosEq": "1.2.3"}

[JSON](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_build_web#outputs)
[Text](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_build_web#outputs)

##### Detached Output[​](https://ionic.io/docs/appflow/cli/reference/appflow_build_web#detached-output "Direct link to Detached Output")

    {  "appId": "052b32ac",  "buildId": 6010455,  "buildNumber": 25,  "buildStatus": "CREATED",  "platform": "WEB",  "commit": "cef1sdca",  "buildStack": {    "name": "Linux - 2022.10",    "dependencies": [      {        "name": "Cordova CLI",        "version": "11.0.0"      },      {        "name": "Ionic CLI",        "version": "6.20.3"      },      {        "name": "Node.js",        "version": "18.12.1"      },      {        "name": "Node.js versions",        "version": "14.21.1 / 16.18.1 / 18.12.1"      },      {        "name": "npm",        "version": "8.19.3"      },      {        "name": "Yarn",        "version": "1.22.19"      },      {        "name": "Python",        "version": "3"      },      {        "name": "Debian",        "version": "11.4"      },      {        "name": "Gradle",        "version": "5.6.4"      },      {        "name": "OpenJDK",        "version": "1.8.0_332 / 11.0.16"      },      {        "name": "Android SDK",        "version": "27-33"      }    ]  },  "environment": {    "name": "Test Environment",    "files": [      ".env-file1",      ".env-file2"    ],    "variables": {      "Var1": "value1",      "Var2": "value2"    },    "secrets": {      "Sec1": "********",      "Sec2": "********"    }  },  "artifacts": {},  "dependencyCaching": null,  "webhooks": null,  "webPreview": true,  "webPreviewUrl": "https://dashboard.ionicframework.com/preview/052b32ac/aq5v80ak38",  "devicePreviewUrl": "https://aq5v80ak38.appflowapp.com",  "androidMin": "1.0.0",  "androidMax": "1.3.0",  "androidEq": "1.2.3",  "iosMin": "1.0.0",  "iosMax": "1.3.0",  "iosEq": "1.2.3"}
